codeReview.summary: Fix feature fully addresses the prior blocking RBAC gap. The reopen endpoint is now restricted at controller boundary with `@PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN')")`, preserving defense-in-depth with service-layer superadmin checks and reason validation. Regression protection was added via both controller contract and truthsuite assertions, and integration coverage validates ROLE_ADMIN/ROLE_ACCOUNTING receive 403 while ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN succeeds.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Scrutiny validator should include first-class fallback guidance for manual review artifact generation when Task-based reviewer fan-out is unavailable due to model alias/environment issues.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: scrutiny-feature-reviewer Task invocation failed in this run with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro`, requiring direct evidence-based review execution.

summary: PASS. The previous blocking finding is remediated: reopen endpoint authorization is superadmin-only at the endpoint boundary and reinforced with targeted contract tests.
